mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 100k signals weakening labor market conditions, increasing recession risks and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in residential construction permits (HOUST) above 150k signals strong housing demand, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 100 signals contraction in manufacturing activity, increasing recession risks and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in CPI (CPIAUCSL) above 2.5% and falling FEDFUNDS signals inflationary pressure with policy inaction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in real sales (RSAFS) below 480 billion and rising unemployment (UNRATE) above 4% signals weakening consumer demand, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 3.5% signals labor market tightness, increasing wage pressures and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 110 combined with falling energy prices (CPIAUCSL) signals strong supply-side growth and disinflation, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 45% of triggered instances despite positive signal.
